description: shadcn-ui radio group style update - components (ui) + config
rationale: Call-graph analysis: radio group component .tsx files and package.json have no function call relationships. Components do not import or call into package manifests. Disconnected components = ERROR.
notes: Previously warning (ui+config = 2 domains). Call-graph analysis treats .tsx components and package.json as disconnected since there are no import/call edges between them.
